title: Unexpected token error

posts.author: janadel (Yiannis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
When I run
query {
webhooks(board_id: 1234567890){
id
event
board_id
config
}
}
from the api playground I get an unexpectet token error … not valid json.

What may happen ?
Thanks

screenshot2144×614 92.6 KB

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @janadel,

I believe if you use a real board ID, you should not have an issue.

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: janadel (Yiannis)
posts.cookedHtml:
You are right but i would expect a better error message.

Thanks for your help.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again,

Matias here!

I will share your feedback with the team in charge of the API

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again,

I am changing this into a request so other can vote for it and our team is in the loop here!

For our team:

The error message that you get when the board ID is not valid for the webhooks query, is as shown in the screenshot in the first message and it would be great to have a more descriptive message in this scenario
